source_pr.title: variable: rename `tmp_table_size` to `tidb_tmp_table_max_size`
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28691

Problem Summary: Rename `tmp_table_size` to `tidb_tmp_table_max_size`

### What is changed and how it works?

- The new system variable `tidb_tmp_table_max_size` limits the memory, instead of `tmp_table_size`, and the max value of `tidb_tmp_table_max_size` is `1<<37`.
- `tmp_table_size` is added to the noop variables list, whose max value is changed to `1<<64 - 1` to be the same with MySQL.

This PR needs to be cherry-picked to 5.1 and 5.2 because some users are using it.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [x] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [x] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [x] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [x] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
The system variable `tmp_table_size` is changed to a noop variable and `tidb_tmp_table_max_size` limits the memory size of temporary tables.
```
